HireHunch
Siddhartha Sarker

4mo ago

### HireHunch is introducing JusRecruit to solve high-volume candidate screening

Hi everyone

While building JusRecruit, we kept hearing the same challenge from recruiting teams:

A single job posting can attract hundreds or even thousands of applicants, but recruiters still need to manually screen resumes, schedule calls, and filter candidates before the hiring manager sees them.

It slows down hiring and takes a huge amount of recruiter time.

0

7

Amit Kumar
Neet Dodhia

results.title: Text your AI from anywhere - Product Hunt
results.content:
🔥 Our Take: Mobile builders have made it much easier to make an app. They have not made it much easier to launch one properly. The bottleneck just moved downstream into store copy, screenshot sets, pricing by market, and all the other stuff that decides whether your app looks legit or half-finished. That is the gap Forvibe is going after.

### Top forum threads [...] ## The email client Product Hunt actually uses

Newsletter Sponsor

Most of us here switched to Superhuman and stopped losing mornings to inbox. AI writes replies, summarizes threads, and triages in seconds. Email and calendar in oneplace, so you're not piecing together context from four different apps.

Fast in a way that actually shows up in your day.

## Stop re-explaining your tools to every new agent

UseAgents is a real-time registry for tools and APIs. Developers define a tool once, and agents can discover and use it without scraping docs, guessing what exists, or relying on stale model knowledge.
